narrative:
Ballville B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 412 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points.
